description:
The EnumMemberEditor component is used in inspectors to edit enum values.

Commonly used in Ref Hacking if interacted with directly by the user instead of as part of an inspector visual.

fields.Continuous: Whether changes should be continuous and instant.
fields._path: The sub path of the value type to edit.
fields._target: The field to edit and get info from.
fields._textDrive: The text field to drive with the enum's contents.
fields._button: The button to edit the enum with.

methods.DecrementEnum: Goes up by 1 in the enum values.
methods.IncrementEnum: Goes down by 1 in the enum values.
